LAW AND MOTION 302, RE: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO VACATE ARBITRATION AWARD. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: RESPONDENT LC HOLDINGS GROUP, LLC'S MOTION TO VACATE ARBITRATION AWARD IS DENIED AND PETITIONERS OLAMIDE OJO-FATI, BAMIDELE OJO-FATI AND PETER DIPO-AJAYI'S PETITION TO CONFIRM THE ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT TO DEPT. 302 A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN. CLERK: R. WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

calendar.matters:
Motion To Vacate Arbitration Award
Off Calendar May-27-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT LC HOLDINGS GROUP, LLC's Motion To Vacate Arbitration Award.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Respondent LC Holdings Group, LLC's motion to vacate arbitration award is DENIED and Petitioners Olamide Ojo-Fati, Bamidele Ojo-Fati and Peter Dipo-Ajayi's Petition to Confirm the Arbitration Award is GRANTED.

***See Word minutes for complete ruling.

Counsel for the prevailing party shall prepare and submit to Dept. 302 a proposed form of order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's tentative ruling.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Motion To Vacate Arbitration Award
Off Calendar May-11-2026 Continued To May-27-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENT LC HOLDINGS GROUP, LLC.'s Motion To Vacate Arbitration Award.

Continued on the court's motion to May 27, 2026.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
